title: Fresh Fruit Food Item Dropping Onto Surface
sourceTitle: Fresh Fruit Food Item Dropping Onto Surface

imagePrompts.prompt: A fresh ramen bowl dropping onto a surface, creating a subtle splash or bounce effect, particles and juice droplets suspended mid-air, vibrant color contrast, studio lighting, high-speed capture, crisp focus, minimal background.
imagePrompts.title: Fresh Fruit Food Item Dropping Onto Surface

prompt: A fresh ramen bowl dropping onto a surface, creating a subtle splash or bounce effect, particles and juice droplets suspended mid-air, vibrant color contrast, studio lighting, high-speed capture, crisp focus, minimal background.
originalPrompt: A fresh ramen bowl dropping onto a surface, creating a subtle splash or bounce effect, particles and juice droplets suspended mid-air, vibrant color contrast, studio lighting, high-speed capture, crisp focus, minimal background.

promptTranslations.zh: 新鲜的[水果/食品]掉落到表面上，产生微妙的飞溅或弹跳效果，颗粒和果汁滴悬浮在半空中，充满活力的色彩对比，工作室照明，高速捕捉，清晰的焦点，最小的背景。
promptTranslations.fr: Un fruit frais tombant sur une surface, créant un subtil effet d'éclaboussure ou de rebond, des particules et des gouttelettes de jus en suspension dans l'air, un contraste de couleurs vibrant, un éclairage de studio, une capture à grande vitesse, une mise au point nette, un arrière-plan minimal.
promptTranslations.ru: Свежий фрукт падает на поверхность, создавая легкий эффект брызг или отскока, частицы и капли сока взвешиваются в воздухе, яркий цветовой контраст, студийное освещение, высокоскоростная съемка, четкий фокус, минимальный фон.
promptTranslations.pt: Uma fruta fresca caindo sobre uma superfície, criando um efeito sutil de respingo ou salto, partículas e gotas de suco suspensas no ar, contraste de cores vibrantes, iluminação de estúdio, captura em alta velocidade, foco nítido, fundo mínimo.
promptTranslations.ja: 新鮮な [果物/食品] が表面に落ち、微妙なスプラッシュまたはバウンス効果を生み出し、空中に浮遊する粒子とジュースの液滴、鮮やかな色のコントラスト、スタジオの照明、高速キャプチャ、鮮明なフォーカス、最小限の背景。
promptTranslations.ko: 표면에 떨어지는 신선한 [과일/식품]이 미묘한 스플래시 또는 바운스 효과를 생성하고, 입자 및 주스 방울이 공중에 떠 있으며, 생생한 색상 대비, 스튜디오 조명, 고속 캡처, 선명한 초점, 최소한의 배경입니다.
